data_source_summary: NFSM National Guidelines (2007); Chhattisgarh State Budget 2025-26; CAG State Accounts Report 2024-25 (Chhattisgarh); Outcome Budget 2025-26; Economic Survey 2024-25

Q30.r: NFSM operational guidelines do not mandate any replenishment, regeneration, or renewal rule for the primary resource (private agricultural land) or for agricultural commons. The scheme is purely production-enhancement oriented: it provides improved HYV seeds, input subsidies, and extension training to increase pulse and oilseed yields, but imposes no obligation to: (a) restore soil fertility, (b) manage water extraction sustainably, (c) maintain seed diversity through replenishment of public seed banks, or (d) adopt any rotation/rest protocol. The scheme's incentive structure (input subsidy for higher yield) may in fact encourage intensification without a compensating replenishment mandate. No fund-withholding, disqualification, or reduced-allocation consequence for non-compliance with a replenishment obligation exists because no such obligation is defined. T4.1 = 0 → AUTOMATIC T4 FAIL triggered.
Q30.src: NFSM National Guidelines (2007) — component descriptions (Seed Supply, Input Support, Extension Training, Demonstration Plots — no replenishment component listed); Chhattisgarh State Budget 2025-26 (budget lines: no NRM/replenishment component); Outcome Budget 2025-26 (results: production metrics only, no replenishment obligation tracked)

Q31.r: Carried T1.1 = 'C' (private land) — not 'E' (intangible commons). Per track selection rule: T1.1 ≠ E → track = RhoRatio. Q32 is answered; Q33 is SKIP.

Q32.v: <<UNVERIFIED: ρ ratio cannot be meaningfully calculated for this scheme. Two compounding reasons: (1) T1.1 = C — primary resource is private land, not a commons; ρ (extraction-to-replenishment ratio for a commons resource) is conceptually inapplicable since no commons extraction boundary exists. (2) T4.1 = No — NFSM mandates no replenishment rate; the denominator of the ρ formula (annual replenishment mandated/created by scheme) = 0, rendering ρ undefined. For informational purposes only: NFSM enables ~22.7 lakh MT annual agricultural extraction (18.5 lakh MT pulses + 4.2 lakh MT oilseeds from scheme-supported area), but mandates zero replenishment, implying ρ → ∞ if the formula were applied. This is consistent with T4 FAIL.>>
Q32.calc: ρ = Extraction (22.7 lakh MT grain equivalent) ÷ Replenishment (0 — no mandated replenishment) → undefined/∞; T1.5 = No → status = Estimated
Q32.interp: FAIL — ρ undefined due to zero mandated replenishment; conceptually inapplicable to private land; consistent with T4.1 = No (no replenishment mandate)
Q32.src: NFSM Guidelines; Outcome Budget 2025-26 (production volumes); T1 output (T1.1 = C, T1.5 = No)
docs: CAG State Accounts Report 2024-25 (Chhattisgarh) — production verified: 18.5 lakh MT pulses, 4.2 lakh MT oilseeds
Outcome Budget 2025-26 — no replenishment mandate or NRM component documented

Q33.calc: SKIP — track = RhoRatio (T1.1 = C, not E)
